ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider of the cookie */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the cookie */,
  "expires" TEXT /* Expiration date or duration of the cookie */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of cookie (e.g., HTTP Cookie, Secure Cookie) */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain to which the cookie belongs */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path on the domain where the cookie is valid */,
  "secure" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the cookie is secure (transmitted over HTTPS) */,
  "http_only" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the cookie is accessible only through HTTP(S) and not via client-side scripts */,
  "same_site" TEXT /* The 'SameSite' attribute of the cookie */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the cookie */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the cookie */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the cookie is currently enabled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cookie was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cookie was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES cookie_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES cookie_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is a default category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the type is a default type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start date and time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End date and time of the session */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Unique token for the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user initiating the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the session is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_consents" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided consent */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cookie for which consent was provided */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was provided */,
  "is_revoked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the consent has been revoked */,
  "revoked_date" TEXT /* Date when the consent was revoked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the consent was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the consent was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_consents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_consents_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_banners" (
  "banner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each banner */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cookie associated with the banner */,
  "banner_text" TEXT /* Text displayed in the banner */,
  "display_date" TEXT /* Date when the banner was displayed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the banner is currently active */,
  "is_dismissed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the banner has been dismissed by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the banner was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the banner was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("banner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_rejections" (
  "rejection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rejection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who rejected the cookie */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cookie that was rejected */,
  "rejection_date" TEXT /* Date when the cookie was rejected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rejection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rejection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rejection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_rejections_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_rejections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_cookies" (
  "session_cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session cookie */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session associated with the cookie */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cookie stored in the session */,
  "session_cookie_value" TEXT /* Value of the cookie stored in the session */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the cookie value is encrypted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session cookie was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session cookie was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_cookies_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_cookies_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "persistent_cookies" (
  "persistent_cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each persistent cookie */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cookie stored persistently */,
  "persistent_cookie_value" TEXT /* Value of the cookie stored persistently */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the cookie expires */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the cookie value is encrypted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the persistent cookie was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the persistent cookie was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("persistent_cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persistent_cookies_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cookie being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the cookie */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the cookie was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, click) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the cookie */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_analytics_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cookie with associated metadata */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., created_date, updated_date) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_metadata_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cookie being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user initiating the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user initiating the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_audit_logs_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)
